events-delete-policy.name: events-delete-policy
events-delete-policy.using:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM admin_permissions
        WHERE admin_id = (select auth.uid())
        AND admin_role IN ('super_admin', 'content_admin')
        AND is_active = true
      )

bot-message-room-members-select-policy.name: bot-message-room-members-select-policy
bot-message-room-members-select-policy.using:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM bot_message_room_members bmrm
        WHERE bmrm.bot_message_room_id = "bot_message_room_members"."bot_message_room_id"
        AND bmrm.profile_id = (select auth.uid())
        AND bmrm.is_hidden = false
      )

bot-message-room-members-insert-policy.name: bot-message-room-members-insert-policy
bot-message-room-members-insert-policy.withCheck:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM bot_message_rooms
        WHERE bot_message_room_id = "bot_message_room_members"."bot_message_room_id"
        AND (
          created_by = (select auth.uid())
          OR EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM bot_message_room_members
            WHERE bot_message_room_id = "bot_message_room_members"."bot_message_room_id"
            AND profile_id = (select auth.uid())
            AND is_hidden = false
          )
        )
      )

bot-message-rooms-select-policy.name: bot-message-rooms-select-policy
bot-message-rooms-select-policy.using:
(select auth.uid()) = "bot_message_rooms"."created_by" OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM bot_message_room_members
        WHERE bot_message_room_id = "bot_message_rooms"."bot_message_room_id"
        AND profile_id = (select auth.uid())
        AND is_hidden = false
      )

bot-messages-select-policy.name: bot-messages-select-policy
bot-messages-select-policy.using:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM bot_message_room_members
        WHERE bot_message_room_id = "bot_messages"."bot_message_room_id"
        AND profile_id = (select auth.uid())
        AND is_hidden = false
      )

bot-messages-insert-policy.name: bot-messages-insert-policy
bot-messages-insert-policy.withCheck:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM bot_message_room_members
        WHERE bot_message_room_id = "bot_messages"."bot_message_room_id"
        AND profile_id = (select auth.uid())
        AND is_hidden = false
      ) AND (
        "bot_messages"."sender_id" = (select auth.uid())::text
        OR "bot_messages"."sender_id" = 'ai-assistant'
      )

clinic-photos-insert-policy.name: clinic-photos-insert-policy
clinic-photos-insert-policy.withCheck:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM clinics
        WHERE clinic_id = "clinic_photos"."clinic_id"
        AND (
          clinic_boss = (select auth.uid())
          OR EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM admin_permissions
            WHERE admin_id = (select auth.uid())
            AND admin_role IN ('super_admin', 'clinic_admin')
            AND is_active = true
          )
        )
      )
